rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>怎么了？你是来支援的吗？

那么你快去找找制作服装的裁缝，
林克那家伙把他们放跑了。
只要把<Color=red>打扮得很华丽<Color=white>的家伙
抓来就行了。
<unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>那些家伙唯独对服装方面的事情
非常了解。
他们甚至还知道
<Color=red>大盗拉姆达<Color=white>收集的<Color=red>服装<Color=white>。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>怎麼了？你是來支援的嗎？

那麼你快去把製作服裝的裁縫找出來，
他們被林克那傢伙放跑了。
既然那些傢伙的<Color=red>裝扮那麼華麗<Color=white>，
我想應該抓誰都行吧。
<unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>畢竟那些傢伙對服裝方面
非常了解，
連<Color=red>大盜拉姆達<Color=white>收集的<Color=red>服裝<Color=white>
都知道得一清二楚啊。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>なんだ？ <Ruby={4:8}おうえん>応援か？

なら リンクの<Ruby={2:4}やつ>奴が<Ruby={2:2}に>逃がしてしまった
<Ruby={4:10}しょうぞく>装束の<Ruby={4:4}した>仕立て<Ruby={2:2}や>屋を<Ruby={2:4}さが>探してきてくれ
あの<Color=red><Ruby={4:4}はで>派手な<Ruby={4:8}かっこう>格好<Color=white>をしてる<Ruby={2:4}やつ>奴らなら
<Ruby={2:4}だれ>誰でもいいだろう
<unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>あいつ<Ruby={2:2}ら>等 <Ruby={2:4}ふく>服に<Ruby={2:4}かん>関することだけは
<Ruby={2:4}くわ>詳しいからな
<Color=red><Ruby={6:12}だいとうぞく>大盗賊のラムダ<Color=white>が<Ruby={2:4}あつ>集めてた<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}ふく>服<Color=white>の<Ruby={2:4}こと>事ですら
<Ruby={2:2}し>知ってるぐらいだしな
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>Who are you? Our backup?


Good. Link let the tailor who made our
outfits escape, so go catch us a new one.

You can recognize tailors by their <Color=red>gaudy
outfits<Color=white>. If you see one—doesn't matter
who—you bring them back here.
<unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>They don't have much sense, but they do
know their clothes.

They probably even know about <Color=red>the Great
Bandit Misko<Color=white>'s clothing collection. I hear
it was legendary. To, uh, tailors.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>等等，不能相信那种
身份不明的家伙啊！
反正那群人经常在<Color=red>道路<Color=white>上来往，
就让我去抓捕他们吧！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>等等，像那種底細不明的人
可不能信任啊！
反正那些傢伙常往來於<Color=red>道路<Color=white>上，
抓人這種事就讓我來吧！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:11]>ちょっ そんなよく<Ruby={2:2}し>知らないヤツ
<Ruby={4:8}しんよう>信用できないですよ！
<Ruby={2:4}やつ>奴らは<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}かいどう>街道<Color=white>をよく<Ruby={2:4}ある>歩いてますし
<Ruby={2:4}つか>捕まえて<Ruby={2:2}く>来るぐらい あっしがやりますよ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]>WHOA! You can't just let info that slip to
some guy we don't even know!

Listen, those tailors are always wandering
the <Color=red>roads <Color=white>without a care in the world. If
we need to grab one, then I'll go do it!

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>怎么了？你就那么想帮忙吗？

那么你快去找找制作服装的裁缝，

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>You want to help us out that badly?


Then go catch us a new tailor to make our
clothes. Link let ours get away.

You can recognize tailors by their <Color=red>gaudy
outfits<Color=white>. It doesn't matter who you find,
just get us one.
<unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>Those guys know <Color=red>clothes<Color=white> so well, they
could probably tell you every piece of the<Color=red>
Great Bandit Misko<Color=white>'s legendary collection.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:9]>你、你是……<unk[5:0]>林克！

可真是好大的胆子！
别以为你能活着回去！<unk[1:3:90 0]>
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:9]>你、你是……<unk[5:0]>林克！

你真是好大的膽子。
可別以為你能活著回去！<unk[1:3:90 0]>
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:9]>お お<Ruby={2:4}まえ>前は… <unk[5:0]>リンク！

いい<Ruby={4:8}どきょう>度胸だ
<Ruby={2:2}い>生きて<Ruby={2:4}かえ>帰れると<Ruby={2:4}おも>思うなよ！<unk[1:3:90 0]>
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:9]>You—you're Link!


You got guts to show your face around
here, but you're not getting out alive!<unk[1:3:90 0]>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>尖刺设置完成！

不过这种连路都没有的地方根本不会有人来吧。
真的有必要这样戒备吗……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>尖刺已經設置完成了！

不過根本沒人會來這種連道路都沒有的地方吧。
有需要警戒成這樣嗎……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>トゲの<Ruby={8:16}せっちかんりょう>設置完了しました！

でも ここは<Ruby={2:4}みち>道もない<Ruby={4:6}ばしょ>場所で <Ruby={2:4}だれ>誰も<Ruby={2:2}こ>来ないだろうし
こんなに<Ruby={4:10}げんじゅう>厳重にする<Ruby={4:8}ひつよう>必要 ありますかね…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>The spikes are all in place.


But do we really need all this? It's not
like anybody ever comes through here.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:9]>我们要警戒的是那个可恨的林克，
那家伙可是会从各种地方钻出来的大麻烦，
警戒度越高越好！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:9]>我們該警戒的是可恨的林克，
那傢伙可是會從各種地方冒出來的麻煩人物。
能多保持警戒是再好不過！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:9]><Ruby={2:4}われ>我らが<Ruby={4:8}けいかい>警戒すべきは あのにっくきリンクだ
アイツは どこにでも<Ruby={2:6}あらわ>現れる<Ruby={6:12}やっかいもの>厄介者だからな
<Ruby={4:8}けいかい>警戒するに<Ruby={2:2}こ>越したことはない！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:9]>We're not on the lookout for "anybody,"
we're on the lookout for Link!

That guy's trouble, and he's got a bad
habit of showing up where you least
expect him. We can never be too careful!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>正好基地刚刚发来了定期联络，
<Color=red>日志<Color=white>里写了<Color=red>机密事项<Color=white>。
除了我们的同伴，不准放任何人进来。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>正好基地那剛傳來定期聯絡，
<Color=red>機密事項<Color=white>已經寫在<Color=red>日誌<Color=white>上了。
除了同伴之外，不准放任何人進來。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>ちょうどアジトから <Ruby={8:14}ていきれんらく>定期連絡が<Ruby={2:2}き>来たばかりで
<Color=red><Ruby={4:6}にっし>日誌<Color=white>には<Color=red><Ruby={8:12}きみつじこう>機密事項<Color=white>が<Ruby={2:2}か>書かれてある
<Ruby={8:12}なかまいがい>仲間以外は <Ruby={4:8}なんぴと>何人たりとも<Ruby={8:14}たちいりきんし>立入禁止だ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>We just received our regular memo
from the hideout—a <Color=red>journal <Color=white>containing
<Color=red>confidential information<Color=white>.
It's for Yiga eyes only. We cannot allow it
to fall into enemy hands.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:9]>这次设置的尖刺
不能再出现任何疏漏！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:9]>這次設置的尖刺
可不能再出現任何疏漏！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:9]><Ruby={4:6}こんど>今度こそトゲの<Ruby={4:6}せっち>設置に
<Ruby={2:2}ぬ>抜かりはないだろうな！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:9]>You better not have skimped on the
spikes this time!

<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 48]>I'm sorry, OK? Next time, I'll do it right.
I'll set the traps up so they'll explode if
anyone gets close!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>你、你脑子秀逗了吗！
那样不就连我们自己都出不去了吗！<unk[5:1]>
<unk[3:0:263]>虽说没必要做到那种程度，
但也要保持相同程度的警戒！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>你、你傻了嗎！
那樣不就連我們都出不去了！<unk[5:1]>
<unk[3:0:263]>雖說不需要做到那種程度，
不過請務必繼續保持同等程度的警戒！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:11]>バ バカやろう！<unk[5:1]>
そんなことをしたら<Ruby={2:4}われ>我らまで <Ruby={2:2}で>出られんだろう！
<unk[3:0:263]>そこまでしなくていいが
そのぐらい <Ruby={4:8}けいかい>警戒を<Ruby={2:6}おこた>怠らないように！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]>A-are you dense?! If you did that, we
wouldn't be able to get out of here!<unk[5:1]>

<unk[3:0:263]>You don't have to go that far! Just...be
roughly as intense in your vigilance!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:9]>林克那家伙……一想到他我就一肚子火！

之前被他打了个措手不及，
下次一定要还以颜色！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:9]>林克那傢伙……一想起來就讓人火大！

雖然上次被突襲打了一個措手不及，
不過下次我絕對會讓他好看的！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:9]>リンクの<Ruby={2:4}やつ>奴め… <Ruby={4:8}いまおも>今思い<Ruby={2:2}だ>出しても<Ruby={4:6}はらだ>腹立たしい！

この<Ruby={2:4}まえ>前は<Ruby={2:6}きゅう>急な<Ruby={4:10}てきしゅう>敵襲で <Ruby={4:4}ふい>不意を<Ruby={2:2}つ>突かれてしまったが
<Ruby={2:4}つぎ>次は<Ruby={2:4}かえ>返りうちだ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:9]>We'll make that rotten Link pay for what
he did!

He may have caught us off guard last
time, but he's in for a nasty surprise if
he tries it again!

<unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>You can recognize tailors by their <Color=red>gaudy

Bandit Misko<Color=white>'s clothing collection. I hear
it was legendary. To, uh, tailors.

怎么能劳烦干部出手呢！

<Ruby={2:2}し>知ってるぐらいだしな
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>What is it? Are you looking for more work
on top of your blademasterly duties?
Your dedication is admirable.
Then I have just the task for you. Link let
the tailor who made our outfits escape,
so could you catch us a new one?
You can recognize tailors by their <Color=red>gaudy
outfits<Color=white>. If you see one, we'd appreciate it
if you kidnapped them for us.
<unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>They don't have much sense, but they do
know their clothes.

They probably even know about the<Color=red> Great
Bandit Misko<Color=white>'s clothing collection. I hear
it was legendary. To, uh, tailors.

rows.CNzh: 竟然能见识到护雷头盔……
